summary: Strict multi-timeframe EMA30 alignment gate with lower-timeframe breakout entry and ATR-based risk management.
core_logic: Require bullish alignment across multiple higher timeframes before considering an entry.
Use lower-timeframe breakout timing for execution.
Treat ATR as a risk and trailing-stop input, not a directional alpha source.
Favor lower position count and conservative leverage.

gaps: single bundled preset with higher-timeframe EMA30 strictness

recommended_next_step: Package it now as a canonical trend-filter bundle, then later add a dedicated plugin that expresses the hard sequential gate explicitly.
